name: odoo-dev-superskill
description: Expert guidelines, architectural templates, and automation tools for Odoo module development, migration, and quality audit.

scaffold.trigger: Creating Odoo modules or addon structures from scratch.

migration.trigger: Upgrading code between Odoo versions (e.g. 16.0 to 18.0), resolving deprecated API calls.

security.trigger: Handling access rights, security groups, ir.model.access.csv, sudo bypasses, controllers security.

xml_ui.trigger: Writing or modifying QWeb, OWL components, views (list/tree, form, kanban), XPath inheritance.

connector.trigger: Developing external APIs, marketplaces, sync connectors, import/export pipelines.

review.trigger: Auditing Odoo code for anti-patterns, checking compliance with OCA standards.

testing.trigger: Writing backend Python tests (TransactionCase) or frontend tests (Hoot/QUnit/Tours).

detect_version.description: Autodetects target Odoo version from __manifest__.py or requirements.txt.

scaffold.description: Generates a complete, OCA-compliant skeleton structure for a new Odoo module.

autofix_xml.description: Auto-refactors deprecated XML view elements (e.g. converting attrs to invisible, <tree> to <list>).

validate_manifest.description: Verifies that __manifest__.py keys are properly structured and valid.

check_anti_patterns.description: Scans Python/XML code for Odoo anti-patterns (e.g. cr.commit, naked excepts, SQL injection).

check_acls.description: Scans models directory and checks that every defined model has a security access rule.

check_coverage.description: Verifies if the module includes tests and checks basic code coverage indicators.

validate_repo_consistency.description: Verifies internal consistency of references and templates cataloged in docs.
